assertions.title: OAuth token expiry with no refresh — Codex session ends

steps.expected: Requires real Codex OAuth tokens to simulate expiry
steps.observed: No real Codex OAuth tokens available. Codex backend shows 'Not connected' status.

assertions.issues: No real Codex OAuth tokens available to simulate expiry.

assertions.title: Simultaneous OAuth flows — multiple backends connecting at once

steps.expected: Requires real OAuth credentials for multiple backends
steps.observed: No real OAuth credentials available for either backend. Both copilot and codex show 'Not connected'.

assertions.issues: No real OAuth credentials available for simultaneous flow testing.

assertions.title: Stats tracking for OAuth backends — requests recorded correctly

steps.action: Make request to copilot/gpt-4o via curl
steps.expected: Request returns 502 (no token), but stats should record
steps.observed: HTTP 502 with error: 'copilot backend copilot: failed to get token: Copilot token exchange failed'

steps.action: Make request to codex/o4-mini via curl
steps.expected: Request returns 502 (no token), but stats should record
steps.observed: HTTP 502 with error: 'codex backend codex: Codex authentication required'

steps.expected: Stats should show entries for copilot and codex backends
steps.observed: Dashboard shows: codex (3 requests, 3 errors, 0 tokens), copilot (9 requests, 9 errors, 0 tokens), openrouter (2 requests, 2 errors, 0 tokens)

assertions.title: Backend toggling with OAuth — disable and re-enable OAuth backend

steps.expected: Models page shows all 3 backends with toggle switches
steps.observed: 3 backend cards visible with toggle checkboxes: openrouter (enabled), copilot (enabled), codex (enabled)

steps.action: GET /v1/models to confirm copilot models present
steps.expected: 7 copilot models listed
steps.observed: 7 copilot models found: copilot/gpt-4o, copilot/gpt-4.1, copilot/o3, copilot/o3-mini, copilot/o4-mini, copilot/claude-sonnet-4, copilot/gpt-4o-mini

steps.expected: 303 redirect, copilot models removed from listing
steps.observed: HTTP 303 redirect returned. Copilot models count dropped to 0 in /v1/models

steps.expected: 303 redirect, copilot models restored
steps.observed: HTTP 303 redirect returned. Copilot models count restored to 7 in /v1/models

steps.action: Navigate to /ui/models to verify UI reflects state
steps.expected: All 3 backends show enabled
steps.observed: All 3 backend cards show enabled state

assertions.title: OAuth disconnect — manual revoke and re-auth

steps.expected: See OAuth Connections section with backend status
steps.observed: OAuth Connections section shows copilot: Not connected, codex: Not connected

steps.action: Look for Disconnect button on connected backend
steps.expected: Disconnect button visible for connected backend
steps.observed: Neither backend shows Disconnect button. Copilot shows 'Check Status', codex shows 'Connect'. Both are 'Not connected'.

assertions.issues: Cannot test disconnect without a connected backend. Both copilot and codex show 'Not connected'. No real OAuth tokens are available to establish a connected state.

assertions.title: OAuth PKCE flow initiation from web UI

steps.expected: 302 redirect to auth.openai.com/authorize with PKCE parameters
steps.observed: HTTP 302 redirect to https://auth.openai.com/authorize with all required PKCE parameters

steps.expected: code_challenge parameter present
steps.observed: code_challenge=H4WbAHiAO9yydTgb1aTkG8P8VN1ijwqS58HKmF3NKjo (present, base64url encoded, 43 chars)

steps.expected: code_challenge_method=S256
steps.observed: code_challenge_method=S256 (present)

steps.expected: response_type=code
steps.observed: response_type=code (present)

steps.expected: redirect_uri pointing back to proxy callback
steps.observed: redirect_uri=http://localhost:8000/ui/oauth/callback/codex (present)

steps.action: Verify redirect URL contains state parameter
steps.expected: state parameter present (UUID format)
steps.observed: state=6d1f76c3-524c-4a27-aea7-0b31dd0d822c (present, UUID format)

evidence.network: GET /ui/oauth/login/codex -> 302 redirect to auth.openai.com/authorize with PKCE parameters. Full redirect URL saved to VAL-CODEX-010-redirect-headers.txt

assertions.title: OAuth callback exchanges authorization code for tokens

steps.expected: Error response (not crash), redirect to settings with error message
steps.observed: HTTP 303 redirect to /ui/settings?msg=OAuth+callback+failed:+codex+oauth+callback:+invalid+or+expired+state+parameter

steps.expected: Redirects to settings page with error message, no crash
steps.observed: Browser redirected to /ui/settings with error message 'OAuth callback failed: codex oauth callback: invalid or expired state parameter'. No console errors.

steps.action: Verify proxy still healthy after invalid callback
steps.expected: Health check returns OK
steps.observed: Proxy remains operational, no crash or errors

assertions.issues: Real OAuth flow (code exchange for tokens) cannot be tested without real OpenAI OAuth credentials. Invalid callback handling verified successfully.

frictions.description: Backend toggle UI is on the Models page (/ui/models), not the Settings page (/ui/settings). The validation contract description says 'navigate to /ui/settings' for toggle, but the actual toggle switches are on /ui/models.
frictions.resolution: Used curl to directly call POST /ui/settings/backends/toggle endpoint after discovering the toggle is on the Models page

frictions.description: Clicking the toggle checkbox on the Models page via agent-browser did not trigger the form submission properly — the backend remained enabled after the click. Had to use curl to directly POST to the toggle endpoint.
frictions.resolution: Used curl POST to /ui/settings/backends/toggle with name=copilot&enabled=false to disable, then name=copilot&enabled=true to re-enable

blockers.description: No real OAuth tokens available for copilot or codex backends — both show 'Not connected'. This blocks testing of token expiry, simultaneous flows, disconnect/reconnect, and real OAuth callback flows.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified copilot token exchange returns 404 (needs active Copilot subscription). Verified codex requires OAuth setup via web UI.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-CROSS-014 stats tracking, VAL-CROSS-015 backend toggling, VAL-CODEX-010 PKCE flow initiation), 4 blocked (VAL-CROSS-012 token expiry, VAL-CROSS-013 simultaneous flows, VAL-CROSS-020 disconnect, VAL-CODEX-011 real OAuth callback — all blocked due to lack of real OAuth credentials/tokens).
